requirement_topic.en: NEN-EN-IEC 62109-1 / 62109-2 Safety Evidence for Netherlands PV Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: NEN-EN-IEC 62109-1 / 62109-2 安全证据——荷兰光伏逆变器
requirement_topic.zht: NEN-EN-IEC 62109-1 / 62109-2 安全證據——荷蘭光伏逆變器

summary.en: For Netherlands solar PV projects, inverter safety documentation should be prepared around NEN-EN-IEC 62109-1 and NEN-EN-IEC 62109-2 type-test evidence for the exact inverter model or family, supporting CE marking under LVD 2014/35/EU. NEN is the national standards body, ACM oversees the energy sector, and the DSOs (Liander, Stedin, Enexis) control the practical grid-connection interface, so project submissions should include accredited IEC safety reports, installation manuals, ratings, nameplate data, protection-device coordination, earthing instructions, and environmental limits. Documentation in Dutch is often expected by Dutch utilities and installers, and files should address enclosure ingress protection, terminal temperature rise, and ventilation for the installed site.
summary.zh: 对于荷兰太阳能光伏项目，逆变器安全文件应围绕准确型号或系列的NEN-EN-IEC 62109-1和NEN-EN-IEC 62109-2型式试验证据准备，以支持依据LVD 2014/35/EU取得CE标志。NEN是国家标准机构，ACM监管能源行业，配电运营商（Liander、Stedin、Enexis）控制实际并网接口，因此项目提交文件应包括认可的IEC安全报告、安装手册、额定值、铭牌数据、保护装置配合、接地说明和环境限值。荷兰公用事业和安装商通常期望荷兰语文件，文件还应说明外壳防护等级、端子温升和安装现场的通风。
summary.zht: 對於荷蘭太陽能光伏項目，逆變器安全文件應圍繞準確型號或系列的NEN-EN-IEC 62109-1和NEN-EN-IEC 62109-2型式試驗證據準備，以支持依據LVD 2014/35/EU取得CE標誌。NEN是國家標準機構，ACM監管能源行業，配電運營商（Liander、Stedin、Enexis）控制實際併網介面，因此項目提交文件應包括認可的IEC安全報告、安裝手冊、額定值、銘牌資料、保護裝置配合、接地說明和環境限值。荷蘭公用事業和安裝商通常期望荷蘭語文件，文件還應說明外殼防護等級、端子溫升和安裝現場的通風。

standards_or_laws: NEN-EN-IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
NEN-EN-IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
LVD 2014/35/EU and NEN standards adoption / conformity expectations where applicable
ACM, TenneT and DSO (Liander, Stedin, Enexis) project documentation requirements for grid-connected solar PV equipment
Project environmental requirements for ingress protection, terminal temperature rise, and thermal derating

summary.en: China safety documentation for PV grid-connected inverters commonly uses GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, domestic CQC or CGC voluntary certification, and CNAS-accredited laboratory reports. These documents are useful for supplier qualification but are not automatically accepted as NEN-EN-IEC 62109-1/-2 evidence for Netherlands projects. Chinese safety reports may also be based on China-rated configurations, labels, manuals, surge protection, and 220/380 V assumptions, while Netherlands project files must reflect 230/400 V, 50 Hz installation conditions and EU CE requirements.
summary.zh: 中国光伏并网逆变器安全文件通常使用GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、国内CQC或CGC自愿认证及CNAS认可实验室报告。这些文件有助于供应商资质评估，但不能自动作为荷兰项目的NEN-EN-IEC 62109-1/-2证据。中国安全报告还可能基于中国额定配置、标签、手册、浪涌保护和220/380 V假设，而荷兰项目文件必须反映230/400 V、50 Hz安装条件和欧盟CE要求。
summary.zht: 中國光伏併網逆變器安全文件通常使用GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、國內CQC或CGC自願認證及CNAS認可實驗室報告。這些文件有助於供應商資質評估，但不能自動作為荷蘭項目的NEN-EN-IEC 62109-1/-2證據。中國安全報告還可能基於中國額定配置、標籤、手冊、浪湧保護和220/380 V假設，而荷蘭項目文件必須反映230/400 V、50 Hz安裝條件和歐盟CE要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
CQC / CGC voluntary certification programmes for China domestic PV inverter safety and performance

gap.en: Gap: A China-only GB/T 37408 or NB/T 32004 safety file does not automatically satisfy Netherlands EU-CE / IEC safety expectations. Exporters should provide NEN-EN-IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test reports for the supplied model or model family, issue an EU Declaration of Conformity, confirm that labels and manuals (often in Dutch) match the Netherlands configuration, and document protection coordination and earthing. Any changes to enclosure, terminals, firmware settings, surge protection, or nameplate ratings for the Netherlands can require updated safety documentation.
gap.zh: 差距：仅中国GB/T 37408或NB/T 32004安全文件不能自动满足荷兰EU-CE/IEC安全要求。出口商应提供所供应型号或型号系列的NEN-EN-IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验报告，出具欧盟符合性声明，确认标签和手册（通常为荷兰语）匹配荷兰配置，并记录保护配合和接地。针对荷兰对外壳、端子、固件设置、浪涌保护或铭牌额定值的任何变更，均可能需要更新安全文件。
gap.zht: 差距：僅中國GB/T 37408或NB/T 32004安全文件不能自動滿足荷蘭EU-CE/IEC安全要求。出口商應提供所供應型號或型號系列的NEN-EN-IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗報告，出具歐盟符合性聲明，確認標籤和手冊（通常為荷蘭語）匹配荷蘭配置，並記錄保護配合和接地。針對荷蘭對外殼、端子、韌體設置、浪湧保護或銘牌額定值的任何變更，均可能需要更新安全文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — CE marking under LVD 2014/35/EU is required for market access; NEN-EN-IEC 62109 safety evidence is effectively required where ACM-overseen, TenneT, DSO (Liander, Stedin, Enexis), EPC, lender, insurer, or project-owner documentation calls for it
mandatory_status.cn: China GB/T, NB/T, CQC, or CGC safety evidence applies to China domestic or voluntary certification contexts and is not automatically transferable to the Netherlands

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not rely on China GB/T or NB/T inverter safety files alone for Netherlands PV projects. Prepare NEN-EN-IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test evidence for the exact model, issue an EU Declaration of Conformity, align labels and manuals (often Dutch-language) to the Netherlands' 230/400 V 50 Hz configuration, and document ingress-protection, terminal-temperature, and thermal-derating controls. Confirm current NEN, ACM, TenneT, DSO, and project-owner safety requirements before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 荷兰光伏项目不应仅依赖中国GB/T或NB/T逆变器安全文件。请为准确型号准备NEN-EN-IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证据，出具欧盟符合性声明，使标签和手册（通常为荷兰语）匹配荷兰230/400 V、50 Hz配置，并记录防护等级、端子温度和热降额控制。出货前请确认现行NEN、ACM、TenneT、配电运营商及项目业主安全要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 荷蘭光伏項目不應僅依賴中國GB/T或NB/T逆變器安全文件。請為準確型號準備NEN-EN-IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證據，出具歐盟符合性聲明，使標籤和手冊（通常為荷蘭語）匹配荷蘭230/400 V、50 Hz配置，並記錄防護等級、端子溫度和熱降額控制。出貨前請確認現行NEN、ACM、TenneT、配電運營商及項目業主安全要求。
